claims: The repository contains a target shell bundling same-radius Boolean constructor obligations for negation, conjunction, and disjunction.
The target shell is stated after the individual same-radius Boolean constructors have been introduced.
The target shell records shared-radius Boolean constructor shape only.
nonclaims: Does not prove a rollup constructor theorem.
Does not prove shared-radius Boolean family recursion.
Does not prove max-radius Boolean recursion.
Does not prove existential quantifier handling.
Does not prove arbitrary formula-radius construction.
Does not prove Gaifman locality for unguarded first-order logic.
Does not prove general finite model theory closure.
